task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the FFT analysis report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of /home/ga/Documents/QGC/fft_analysis_report.txt.

task_completion.description: Agent opens QGroundControl and navigates to the Parameters menu.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl application is visible on screen, with the Vehicle Setup -> Parameters tab selected.

task_completion.description: Agent configures the INS_HNTCH parameters in QGroundControl.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl parameter list showing INS_HNTCH parameters being modified. Look for values like INS_HNTCH_FREQ=92, INS_HNTCH_BW=46, INS_HNTCH_REF=0.24, INS_HNTCH_ENABLE=1, INS_HNTCH_MODE=1, INS_HNTCH_ATT=40, and INS_LOG_BAT_OPT=2.

task_completion.description: Agent creates the filter summary text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., gedit, nano) or terminal command creating or editing /home/ga/Documents/QGC/filter_summary.txt.

task_completion.description: Agent writes the required values and confirmation phrase to the summary file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The summary file contains the Frequency (92), Bandwidth (46), Reference Thrust (0.24), and the exact phrase 'Ready for post-filter test flight'.

integrity.description: Agent used the QGroundControl GUI to set parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking and typing within the QGroundControl application interface, rather than modifying a configuration file via terminal.

integrity.description: Agent read the FFT report before configuring parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: The FFT report should be visible in earlier screenshots before the QGroundControl parameters are modified.

integrity.description: Agent manually entered the summary information.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen typing or pasting the summary content into a text editor or terminal, rather than using a pre-existing script to generate it.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The FFT analysis report specifies a center frequency of 92 Hz and reference thrust of 0.24. The required parameters to be set in QGroundControl are: INS_HNTCH_ENABLE=1, INS_HNTCH_MODE=1, INS_HNTCH_FREQ=92, INS_HNTCH_BW=46 (exactly half of 92), INS_HNTCH_REF=0.24, INS_HNTCH_ATT=40, and INS_LOG_BAT_OPT=2. The summary file must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/filter_summary.txt and contain the values 92, 46, 0.24, along with the exact phrase 'Ready for post-filter test flight'.
